story.iWant: to generate a custom slide layout for complex content
story.soThat: users aren't limited to predefined templates

task.title: Extend build-one Workflow for Custom Build Path

subtasks.subtask: Update `.slide-builder/workflows/build-one/instructions.md` to add Phase 3B: Custom Build
Add condition in Phase 2 (Template Decision) to route to Phase 3B when suggested_template: "custom"
Add fallback route when template file is missing
Load theme.json completely for skill context
Prepare frontend-design skill invocation context with theme, intent, key_points, visual_guidance, and constraints
Invoke frontend-design skill with prepared context
Capture generated HTML output
Validate generated HTML has contenteditable on text elements
If missing, add contenteditable="true" to text elements (h1, h2, h3, p, li, span)
Validate data-field attributes exist on contenteditable elements
If missing, generate unique data-field values based on element type and position
Validate CSS variables from theme are used
Validate dimensions (viewport 1920x1080)

task.title: Add Auto-Save Script and Viewport Scaling

subtasks.subtask: Check if auto-save JavaScript exists in generated slide
If missing, inject the standard auto-save script (from Story 3.2 pattern)
Add viewport auto-scaling CSS (from Story 3.2 template modifications)
Ensure script handles all contenteditable elements with data-field

task.title: Save Custom Slide and Update State

subtasks.subtask: Save validated HTML to `.slide-builder/single/slide.html`
Update status.yaml: built_count: 1, last_action, history array
Display slide file path to user
Log "Custom layout generated" for observability
Test with plan.yaml having suggested_template: "custom" (Venn diagram intent)
Test with complex diagram request (flowchart with multiple branches)
Test with unique layout request (comparison matrix)
Verify slide.html created with correct dimensions
Verify all text elements have contenteditable and data-field
Verify CSS variables match theme.json
Verify status.yaml shows custom build in last_action
Run Frontend Test Gate checklist
Cross-browser test: Chrome, Firefox, Safari

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given a single-slide plan exists with no matching template (suggested_template: "custom"), when the user runs `/build-one`, then the system invokes the frontend-design skill
The frontend-design skill receives: full theme.json, slide intent, content requirements
The generated custom slide follows all theme primitives (colors, fonts, shapes)
All text elements in the custom slide have contenteditable attributes
Given a complex diagram or unique layout is requested, when the frontend-design skill generates the slide, then the output is production-quality, not placeholder

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Custom Builder module generates custom layout via frontend-design skill when templates don't match. Skill receives full theme.json, slide intent, and constraints (1920x1080, contenteditable required).

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: If no template match found, invoke frontend-design skill for custom layout. Log decision in status.yaml. ADR-002 establishes hybrid approach for brand consistency via templates with flexibility via skill.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: All text elements MUST have contenteditable="true" and data-field attributes. Slides MUST use theme CSS variables (--color-primary, --font-heading, etc.) and render at 1920x1080.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: System invokes frontend-design skill with slide intent and theme, generates custom HTML layout, applies theme CSS variables. Output is production-quality for complex diagrams or unique layouts.

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: FR28: System can create custom layouts for complex content. Layout flexibility allows Claude to build fully custom layouts for complex stories.

doc.title: Previous Story - Template-Based Slide Building
doc.snippet: Established build-one workflow at .slide-builder/workflows/build-one/. Auto-save script pattern, viewport scaling, data-field attributes all implemented. Test Gate PASSED.

artifact.reason: Workflow to extend with Phase 3B custom build path. Contains template_mapping and output locations.
Template decision logic (Phase 2) and template build (Phase 3) - add Phase 3B for custom build. Already has placeholder for custom at line 96.
Complete theme object to pass to frontend-design skill. Contains colors, typography, shapes required for custom slide generation.
State file to update after custom build. Pattern: built_count, last_action, history array.
Reference for HTML slide structure: viewport scaling CSS, contenteditable pattern, auto-save script, data-field attributes.
Input file containing intent, key_points, visual_guidance, suggested_template. When suggested_template is "custom", triggers Phase 3B.

skills.skill: Claude Code skill for generating custom HTML layouts. Receives theme + intent, outputs complete HTML slide.

constraints.constraint: Hybrid Template + Skill Generation: Template-based builds preferred for speed; custom builds via skill used for novel layouts that don't match templates.
HTML Slide Pattern: Custom slides MUST follow same structure as template slides - contenteditable attributes, data-field selectors, theme CSS variables.
Custom slide generation should complete within 30 seconds (frontend-design skill invocation).
All text elements MUST have contenteditable="true" and data-field attributes.
Slides MUST use theme CSS variables from theme.json (--color-primary, --font-heading, etc.).
Slides MUST be self-contained HTML (no external dependencies except Google Fonts).

interface.name: frontend-design skill
interface.signature: Input: - Theme JSON object (complete: colors, typography, shapes) - Slide intent description (from plan.yaml) - Content requirements (key_points, visual_guidance from plan.yaml) - Dimension constraints (1920x1080) Output: Complete HTML slide with embedded CSS

interface.name: plan.yaml suggested_template field
interface.signature: When suggested_template === "custom" OR template file missing: → Route to Phase 3B (Custom Build) Else: → Route to Phase 3A (Template Build)

interface.name: Auto-save script pattern

tests.standards: Per Architecture test strategy: Unit tests verify skill invocation with correct context and HTML validation/post-processing. Integration tests verify full /build-one workflow from custom plan to saved slide. Cross-browser tests verify custom slide renders correctly in Chrome, Firefox, Safari. Quality tests perform visual inspection of complex diagrams (Venn, flowchart, matrix) for production-readiness.

locations.location: Manual testing via Frontend Test Gate checklist in story file
Browser DevTools inspection for contenteditable, data-field, CSS variables
Cross-browser testing: Chrome, Firefox, Safari at 1920x1080

ideas.idea: Plan slide with "Venn diagram showing overlap of 3 concepts" - verify frontend-design skill is invoked when suggested_template is "custom"
Log/trace skill invocation parameters - verify theme.json, intent, and key_points are passed correctly
Inspect generated CSS for theme variable usage (--color-primary, --font-heading, --corner-radius)
Open slide in browser, verify viewport meta and body dimensions are 1920x1080
Use DevTools to query all text elements - verify each has contenteditable="true" and data-field attribute
Visual inspection: Complex Venn diagram should show actual overlapping circles with meaningful content, not placeholder boxes
Test edge cases: missing template file (fallback to custom), very complex intent (multi-branch flowchart), minimal intent
